## This directory contains test suite taken from https://github.com/bext-lang/b

Bext-lang supports C like assignment operators (a+=1) as well.
Baskell also supports both for compatibility.

Bext-lang supports C like escape characters. B uses '\*' for
escaping. The tests have been modified to use '\*n' instead of '\\n'
